	<MagicDraw_Profile:DiagramInfo xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158305_163089_31686' base_Diagram='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302151552_617050_18159' Creation_date='6/7/16 3:23 PM' Modification_date='6/8/16 8:49 AM' Author='zilstr' Last_modified_by='zilstr'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158305_837334_31685' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302151551_314753_18158' Text='' Id='STN1'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177868_885720_33451' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158301_37766_31680' Id='STN1.2' Text=''/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190046_435729_35406' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177866_841707_33447' Id='STN1.2.1' Text='Possible to set and maintain wanted cabin temperature'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190046_169092_35407' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177866_540047_33448' Id='STN1.2.2' Text='Shall be able to control user set temperature'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190046_271598_35408' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177867_15305_33449' Id='STN1.2.3' Text='Shall be able to heat and cool&#10;'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190047_277514_35409' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177867_354553_33450' Id='STN1.2.4' Text='The Climate Control Unit shall work whenever client wants'/>
	<DSL_Customization:NumberOwner xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302151568_198117_18180' base_Element='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302150638_332761_18094'>
		<customNumberingData>Multi-levelɲɪɳtrueɲɪɳfalseɲɪɳSTNɲɪɳɲɪɳ1ɲɪɳ_17_0_4beta_1b3a0482_1355297412593_609711_22854ɲɪɳ_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147873236436_846958_2313ɲɪɳ_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147873190330_159934_2220ɲɪɳtrue</customNumberingData>
	</DSL_Customization:NumberOwner>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177869_667137_33454' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158302_101095_31681' Id='STN1.3' Text=''/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190047_435894_35410' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177868_23035_33452' Id='STN1.3.1' Text='Mass of unit shall not be bigger than 5 percent of total car mass'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177870_785455_33456' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158303_605519_31682' Id='STN1.4' Text=''/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190047_162482_35411' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177868_877356_33453' Id='STN1.3.2' Text='Unit shall be able to control two independent zones in car cabin'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190047_594217_35412' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177869_236534_33455' Id='STN1.4.1' Text='Energy consumption shall not limit car&#39;s performance'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177872_554407_33459' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158303_747382_31683' Id='STN1.5' Text=''/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190047_690649_35413' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177870_498120_33457' Id='STN1.5.1' Text='Unit development time shall not be more than one year of team working hours after project start'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302190047_806417_35414' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177871_71118_33458' Id='STN1.5.2' Text='Price of the unit shall not be bigger than 2 percent of total car cost'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302177872_554100_33460' base_Class='_18_4beta_95202a9_1465302158304_437737_31684' Id='STN1.6' Text='The Climate Control Unit maintenance shall be done in terms which are in market average range&#10;'/>
